description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:alpine Docker image. Define a job named aptly that runs in the default test stage, is triggered only by pipeline triggers, and executes the shell commands: apk --no-cache add bash curl jq; gem install aptly_cli --no-rdoc --no-ri; and ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.gitlab-ci/upload.sh. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
